# SpartanH2 Deploy Web

**⚠️ Do not edit files here directly.**

This repo is auto-populated by GitHub Actions in [Main-SpartanH2-Website](https://github.com/VectaShield/Main-SpartanH2-Website) on every push to `main`.

## Structure
```
├── main/       # SpartanH2.com production site (served by Hostinger)
└── (future sites may live in sibling subfolders — shop/, etc.)
```

## Hosting
Hostinger auto-deploys from this repo's `main` branch.
